entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop of the study, Cicer arietinum L.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the chickpea crop.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water that affects crop growth.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under drought stress.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI (QTLS)
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with a quantitative trait.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES (RILS)
entities.description: A population of homozygous lines used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC CROSS
entities.description: A cross between two different species used to develop RILs.

entities.name: GPF 2
entities.description: A drought-tolerant genotype of Cicer arietinum.

entities.name: ILWC 292
entities.description: A drought-sensitive accession of Cicer reticulatum.

entities.name: MORPHO-PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the physical and physiological characteristics of the plant.

entities.name: ROOT-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Traits specifically related to the root system of the plant.

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where water is supplied only by rain.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where water is supplied artificially.

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify QTLs.

entities.name: LUDHIANA
entities.description: A location where the study was conducted.

entities.name: FARIDKOT
entities.description: A location where the study was conducted.

entities.name: CONSENSUS QTLS
entities.description: QTLs that are consistently identified across different environments or traits.

entities.name: QTL CLUSTERS
entities.description: Groups of QTLs located in close proximity on a chromosome.

entities.name: CALG04
entities.description: A specific linkage group in the chickpea genome.

entities.name: CALG06
entities.description: A specific linkage group in the chickpea genome.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic information to improve traits.

entities.name: ELITE CULTIVARS
entities.description: High-performing crop varieties used in breeding programs.
